macro_articles.title: What a United-American merger would mean, from antitrust hurdles to airfare
macro_articles.summary: United Airlines CEO Scott Kirby reportedly floated a potential merger with Trump administration officials earlier this year.

macro_articles.summary: Traffic through the Strait of Hormuz remains at a trickle, despite President Donald Trump proclaiming that a ceasefire with Iran depended on it reopening.

macro_articles.summary: Eric Swalwell already faced a pending criminal investigation by the Manhattan DA's office over an allegation of sexual assault by another woman.

macro_articles.summary: Daniel Moreno-Gama allegedly threw a lit Molotov cocktail at OpenAI CEO Sam Altman's home and threatened to burn down OpenAI's headquarters.

macro_articles.summary: The investment bank said volumes will reach an estimated $240 billion in 2026 and grow at a 80% compound annual rate between 2025 and 2030.

macro_articles.summary: Kevin Warsh, nominee to lead the Federal Reserve, detailed his holdings in newly released financial disclosures.

macro_articles.summary: Bessent has previously said the Fed should hasten cutting interest rates, calling reductions "the only ingredient missing" for stronger economic growth.

macro_articles.summary: "It probably won't surprise anyone that we are again putting capital preservation at the top of our priorities," Einhorn said in his latest investor letter.

macro_articles.summary: A prolonged blockage of the Strait of Hormuz for the next six to 12 months will mean an unavoidable recession, the billionaire investor said.

macro_articles.summary: Panelists at the Semafor World Economy conference said artificial intelligence can supplement the work that's already done, improving its quantity and quality.

cnbc_sector_articles.summary: Baidu's Apollo Go robotaxis stopped mid-traffic in a Chinese city on Tuesday, leading to at least one highway collision, according to social media.

cnbc_sector_articles.summary: A new survey by Vanderbilt University found that most Nashville residents don't want Boring Company tunnels in their city.
